utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. The final package includes all 7 items. Now check if each is fully specified: (1) destination – 'Prague, Czech Republic' is clearly stated; (2) travel_dates – 'July 10-14, 2024' gives specific dates; (3) transportation – includes airline, departure airport, flight class, and cost, so fully specified; (4) accommodation – includes property, type, rating, number of nights, and cost, so fully specified; (5) activities – lists specific activities with total cost, so covered; (6) additional_services – includes dining and travel insurance, both specified with cost info for dining; (7) total_budget – gives detailed cost breakdown with totals and remaining budget. All 7 items are present and complete.
